Question Text: [HI] एक निश्चित जमा राशि पर 4.5% वार्षिक दर से एक वर्ष में ₹135 ब्याज प्राप्त होता है। उसी जमा राशि पर 5% वार्षिक दर से एक वर्ष में कितना अतिरिक्त ब्याज प्राप्त होगा? [EN] A certain deposit earns ₹135 as interest in one year at the rate of 4.5% per annum. How much additional interest will be earned on the same deposit in one year at the rate of 5% per annum?
Explanation: [HI] माना मूलधन x ₹ है। प्रश्ननुसार, साधारण ब्याज = (मू. × दर × समय) / 100 => 135 = (x × 4.5 × 1) / 100 => x = ₹3000. पुनः 5% दर पर ब्याज = (3000 × 5 × 1) / 100 = ₹150. अतिरिक्त ब्याज = 150 - 135 = 15 रूपये। [EN] Let the principal be ₹x. According to the question, Simple Interest = (Principal × Rate × Time) / 100 => 135 = (x × 4.5 × 1) / 100 => x = ₹3000. Now interest at 5% = (3000 × 5 × 1) / 100 = ₹150. Additional interest = 150 - 135 = ₹15.

Question Text: [HI] ₹21,000 की राशि पर साधारण ब्याज की दर से 3 वर्षों में अर्जित ब्याज ₹6,400 है। वार्षिक ब्याज दर ज्ञात करें। [EN] The simple interest earned on a sum of ₹21,000 in 3 years is ₹6,400. Find the annual rate of interest.
Explanation: [HI] मूलधन = ₹ 21000 समय = 3 वर्ष ब्याज = ₹6400, दर = ? प्रश्नानुसार, साधारण ब्याज = (मू × दर × समय) / 100 => 6400 = (21000 × दर × 3) / 100 => दर = 640/63 => दर = 10 10/63 % [EN] Principal = ₹ 21000, Time = 3 years, Interest = ₹6400, Rate = ? According to the question, Simple Interest = (Principal × Rate × Time) / 100 => 6400 = (21000 × Rate × 3) / 100 => Rate = 640 / 63 => Rate = 10 10/63 %

Question Text: [HI] एक व्यक्ति ने साधारण ब्याज पर कुछ राशि उधार ली। 4 वर्षों के बाद, उसने ऋणदाता को 9/5 राशि वापस कर दी। ब्याज की दर क्या थी? [EN] A person borrowed some amount on simple interest. After 4 years, he returned 9/5 of the amount to the lender. What was the rate of interest?
Explanation: [HI] माना उधार की गयी राशि x रुपये तथा साधारण ब्याज की दर r% वार्षिक है। तब, साधारण ब्याज = (9/5)x - x = 4x/5 => 4x/5 = (x × 4 × r) / 100 => r = 20% वार्षिक [EN] Let the borrowed amount be ₹x and the rate of simple interest be r% per annum. Then, Simple Interest = (9/5)x - x = 4x/5 => 4x/5 = (x × 4 × r) / 100 => r = 20% p.a.

Question Text: [HI] कितने समय में 4% वार्षिक दर से ₹10,000 पर उतना ही ब्याज प्राप्त होगा, जितना 5% साधारण ब्याज दर पर 4 वर्ष में ₹8,000 पर प्राप्त होता है? [EN] In how much time will the interest earned on ₹10,000 at 4% per annum be the same as the simple interest earned on ₹8,000 at 5% per annum for 4 years?
Options: (a) [HI] 3 वर्ष [EN] 3 years (b) [HI] 5 वर्ष [EN] 5 years (c) [HI] 6 वर्ष [EN] 6 years (d) [HI] 4 वर्ष [EN] 4 years
Explanation: [HI] माना t वर्ष में प्राप्त होगा। प्रश्नानुसार, ∵ साधारण ब्याज = (मू × दर × समय) / 100 => (10000 × 4 × t) / 100 = (8000 × 5 × 4) / 100 => 40t = 160 => t = 160/40 = 4 वर्ष [EN] Let it be earned in t years. According to the question, ∵ Simple Interest = (Principal × Rate × Time) / 100 => (10000 × 4 × t) / 100 = (8000 × 5 × 4) / 100 => 40t = 160 => t = 160/40 = 4 years
